mechanism_narrative: A lower FEDFUNDS reading transmits through discount-rate relief and easier financial conditions, lifting equity valuations and supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS declines without a positive 20d SPX edge, or if triggered sample returns are negative in more than 60% of easing observations over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals weakening household income and demand, which should pressure corporate earnings expectations and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE breakouts are followed by positive 20d SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the sign relationship disappears in a 2-year rolling backtest.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS accelerates while CPIAUCSL is stable, real consumer demand is improving faster than inflation erosion, which should support positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint RSAFS-up and CPI-stable periods do not outperform unconditional SPX returns, or if the interaction term is not positive in a rolling 3-year regression.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in INDPRO signals slowing industrial activity and weaker cyclical earnings momentum, which should lead to negative S&P 500 returns over a one-quarter horizon.
failure_condition: Reject if declining INDPRO is followed by positive 60d SPX returns more often than not, or if the effect vanishes after controlling for market trend in any 4-quarter window.

mechanism_narrative: A housing-starts surge above recent levels signals stronger construction demand and broad cyclical growth, which should improve S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST breakouts fail to produce positive median 20d SPX returns, or if the hit rate is below 55% across triggered events in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: A joint signal of falling PAYEMS and rising UNRATE identifies a genuine labor-market deterioration that should translate into weaker equity returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined payroll-loss and unemployment-rise state does not predict lower SPX returns than either series alone, or if the interaction coefficient is unstable across rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: In a monetary tightening cycle, a FEDFUNDS level above the recent norm suppresses valuation multiples and raises recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if high-FEDFUNDS periods do not precede negative 60d SPX returns, or if the effect is absent when CPI inflation is elevated.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 and RSAFS both strengthen together, broad real demand is improving across business and consumer channels, which should generate positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous GDPC1 and RSAFS improvements fail to outperform baseline on 60d SPX returns, or if the joint effect is not positive in any 3-year rolling sample.
